location: Reward for defeating the Stonedigger Troll boss inside Old Altus Tunnel, a mini-dungeon in Altus Plateau sealed by an Imp Statue that requires 2 Stonesword Keys.
tactics: Approach from Erdtree-Gazing Hill Grace, drop into the valley, and follow the cliff north to find the fogged entrance, past a spectral rider and a hidden giant
The dungeon's only Site of Grace sits at the bottom of the entry lift — rest there before pushing on to the boss fog further in
The Troll's Hammer, a separate colossal weapon, sits on a corpse earlier in the same tunnel — don't assume you're done after picking that up
lore: A colossal club said to be a withered but unbreakable branch of the Erdtree itself, sanctified with holy power; wielding it effectively takes raw brute strength rather than any real finesse.

builds.name: Strength/Faith Godclub build
builds.why: C-scaling Strength with a side of Faith and innate holy damage make it a natural fit for a Strength/Faith hybrid, backed by its Golden Land skill.
